title: Feedback from Acme Robotics — Dashboards
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Acme Robotics (Enterprise)
NPS score: 2
Product area: Dashboards

Comment: The dashboard takes 12 seconds to load when I have more than 5 widgets. It's unusable for our morning standup.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Slack integration'.
